title: Implementation Tasks
description: Task graph for feature implementation. Tasks are nodes in a DAG with explicit depends_on edges. Full traceability back to the upstream planning artifacts used to derive the task graph. The top-level 'version' field is a repository-specific schema metadata extension consumed by the validation scripts.

schema_version.description: Version of the tasks schema this file was written against.

feature.description: Feature slug matching the feature package directory name.

version.description: SemVer version of this task list.

status.description: Current = aligned with design. Stale = design changed. Implemented = all tasks done.

source_design_version.description: Version of design.adoc used to derive tasks. Present only when design informed this task graph.

source_spec_version.description: Version of spec.yaml used to derive tasks. Present only when spec informed this task graph.

last_updated.description: Date of last update in YYYY-MM-DD format.

overview.description: Brief summary of what is being implemented, total tasks.

tasks.description: All tasks as a flat list. Dependencies are explicit via depends_on.

id.description: Unique task ID (e.g., 'TASK-001'). Sequential across the entire file.

done.description: Whether this task has been completed.

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must complete before this task can start. Empty means no dependencies (root task).

components.description: Design components involved. Omit when no design informed this task graph.

stories.description: Story IDs this task contributes to.

description.description: What to implement and key details.
